title: Anti Bundle Dupe
description: This plugin disable the Bundle Duping withouth disabling the bundles.
body:
**A simple plugin for disable the Bundle items duping without disabling the Bundles.**

This plugin is compatible with plugins like OpenInv.

When a player try to dupe with bundles the plugin cancel the dupe and alert to admins.

![Message send to admins.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48cf025b00c1a4368fc540620892259dcb705464.png)

![Message send to Console.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6888569d57d434d2dfc36213f95e85b1758b4ee0.png)

Permissions:
- antibundledupe.admin - Alert to admins when anyone try to dupe.

_If you need help with this plugin contact me in Discord: Ngials_
